prompt: Tap left hole card (As) before final frequency choice.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before exploit action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor because the ace blocker is what keeps the final frequency choice tied to the real hand.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Tap the ace of spades because the left hole card anchors the final frequency decision.
